instructions: Feature/functionality workspaces are prescribed (vision/ + rules_and_constraints/), not unprescribed - creative subdirectories provide flexibility
Functionalities don't have to be user-facing - systemic functionalities qualify for workspaces
README purpose section should articulate the power of the documentation structure
Vision topics captured during development are the fuel for the next generation of features - document this explicitly
Include task-scale routing in README so developers know which process to follow
